wine_hotels.name: Hostellerie du Chateau des Fines Roches
wine_hotels.wine_programme: One-Michelin-star restaurant with 2,500-bottle cellar; estate wine pairings with breakfast; tasting excursions to neighbouring domaines
wine_hotels.description: Neo-gothic chateau in the heart of the Chateauneuf-du-Pape appellation overlooking vineyards. Fourteen rooms; Michelin-starred dining; the most atmospheric wine hotel in the Southern Rhone.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel La Mirande
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Sommelier-curated Rhone Valley list of 180 wines; in-house wine tasting evenings with Southern Rhone estates; cocktail bar with Rhone spirits and natural wine by the glass
wine_hotels.description: Opulent 14th-century cardinal's palace hotel behind the Palais des Papes with a legendary wine salon. Sommelier team maintains one of Avignon's finest Rhone Valley cellars; the hotel organises private visits to Chateauneuf-du-Pape estates.

wine_hotels.name: Le Clair de la Plume
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Grignan-les-Adhemar and Cotes du Rhone Villages cellar; sommelier dinners with local domaines; estate excursions in the Drome provencale
wine_hotels.description: Boutique hotel in the village of Grignan beneath the Renaissance chateau, with garden suites and vineyard views. The restaurant majors on Grignan-les-Adhemar and Tricastin wines paired with Drome herbs and truffles.

wine_hotels.name: Auberge de Cassagne and Spa
wine_hotels.address: 450 allée de Cassagne, 84130 Le Pontet, France
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Wine Spectator Award of Excellence; 8,000-bottle cellar; sommelier-led pairing dinners; private tastings at Chateauneuf-du-Pape arranged on request
wine_hotels.description: Relais and Chateaux property outside Avignon with a Michelin-starred restaurant and Wine Spectator Award of Excellence. The hotel's Rhone Valley wine programme makes it a practical base for Southern Rhone wine tourism with full concierge access to estate visits.

wine_hotels.name: Chateau La Canorgue
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Estate organic Luberon wines; breakfast with estate wine; cellar tour and harvest experience available
wine_hotels.description: Working organic wine estate in the Luberon with five guest rooms set among the vineyards. The Margan family produces Luberon AOP and organic Cotes du Rhone; film location for A Good Year (Ridley Scott, 2006). Harvest stays available in October.

wine_hotels.name: Domaine de la Ponche
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Estate Vacqueyras and Gigondas wines at breakfast and dinner; cellar visits included; Dentelles de Montmirail vineyard walks from the property
wine_hotels.description: Chambre d'hotes at the Vacqueyras estate of the Chamfort family, offering four rooms with estate wine experience. Located between Gigondas and Vacqueyras village with Dentelles de Montmirail backdrop; cellar visits and harvest stays available.

wine_hotels.name: L'Oustau de Baumaniere
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Two-Michelin-star restaurant with 50,000-bottle cellar; Les Baux-de-Provence AOC estate wines; Rhone Valley back-vintage cellar; guest sommelier evenings
wine_hotels.description: Legendary Relais and Chateaux estate at Les Baux-de-Provence with two Michelin stars and one of Provence's finest wine cellars, including extensive Rhone Valley vertical collections. The gateway luxury estate for combining Rhone Valley wine tourism with the Alpilles.

wine_hotels.name: Hotel d'Europe
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Southern Rhone wine list; Chateauneuf-du-Pape vertical collection; regular estate tasting events organised for guests
wine_hotels.description: Five-star hotel established in 1580 in a former Avignon nobleman's mansion, one block from the Palais des Papes. Wine programme focuses on Southern Rhone with estate tasting evenings; ideal location for day trips to Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Gigondas and Beaumes-de-Venise.

wine_hotels.name: Les Hauts de Gigondas
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Exclusively Gigondas and Dentelles de Montmirail wines; cellar tour with L'Oustalet; morning vineyard walks; curated estate tasting packages
wine_hotels.description: Boutique hotel above Gigondas village with panoramic Dentelles de Montmirail vineyard views. All twelve rooms have terrace or balcony; the hotel partners with L'Oustalet restaurant and Famille Perrin for wine-immersion packages.

wine_hotels.name: La Bastide de Gordes
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Rhone Valley and Provence wine cellar; sommelier-curated pairing dinners; excursions to Chateauneuf-du-Pape and Gigondas arranged
wine_hotels.description: Five-star Relais and Chateaux hotel in the hilltop village of Gordes with infinity pool overlooking Luberon vineyards. The sommelier team curates Rhone Valley and Provence wine experiences with day excursions to Chateauneuf-du-Pape and the Dentelles de Montmirail.

wine_hotels.name: Relais du Vieux Village Seguret
wine_hotels.wine_programme: Seguret and Sablet village wines at dinner; estate tastings at Domaine de Mourchon and Domaine du Coriançon; walking routes through Cotes du Rhone Villages vineyards
wine_hotels.description: Small village hotel in Seguret, one of the Rhone's most picturesque Cotes du Rhone Villages, with terrace views over the Dentelles de Montmirail. Wine programme focused on the immediate village appellation.
